name: checkbox-demo
visual_summary: CheckboxDemo is a customizable form component used to allow users to select single or multiple items from a list. It is commonly used in surveys, filtering options, and data selection. This component can be easily integrated into various forms and applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: checkbox-demo
Description: CheckboxDemo is a customizable form component used to allow users to select single or multiple items from a list. It is commonly used in surveys, filtering options, and data selection. This component can be easily integrated into various forms and applications.
Style: default, dark, minimal
Interactions: disabled, highlighted, focused
Tags: form component, selection, survey, filtering, checkbox

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
